story.iWant: enhanced ApiEndpoint decorator with ApiBody integration and a global response interceptor
story.soThat: API documentation is consistent and responses are in standard format
story.tasks: - Task 1: Enhance ApiEndpoint Decorator with ApiBody Support (AC: 8.5-2.1) - Task 2: Enhance ApiCrud Decorators with Body Schema Support (AC: 8.5-2.2) - Task 3: Remove Manual ApiBody from Controllers (AC: 8.5-2.3) - Task 4: Create Global Response Interceptor (AC: 8.5-2.4) - Task 5: Integrate i18n into Response Interceptor (AC: 8.5-2.7) - Task 6: Register Global Interceptor (AC: 8.5-2.5) - Task 7: Refactor Controllers to Remove Manual Response Wrapping (AC: 8.5-2.6) - Task 8: Refactor Services to Return Raw Data (AC: 8.5-2.6) - Task 9: Verify Interceptor-Exception Filter Compatibility (AC: 8.5-2.8) - Task 10: Test Response Type Detection (AC: 8.5-2.9) - Task 11: Update Swagger Response Decorators (AC: 8.5-2.9) - Task 12: Build Validation and Integration Testing (AC: 8.5-2.10) - Task 13: Write Unit Tests for Interceptor

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. **AC-8.5-2.1:** ApiEndpoint decorator enhanced with ApiBody integration 2. **AC-8.5-2.2:** ApiCrud decorator enhanced with body schema support 3. **AC-8.5-2.3:** All manual ApiBody decorators removed from controllers 4. **AC-8.5-2.4:** Global Response Interceptor created with standard format wrapping 5. **AC-8.5-2.5:** Global Interceptor registered in main.ts 6. **AC-8.5-2.6:** Controllers and services refactored - raw data flow 7. **AC-8.5-2.7:** Response Interceptor integrated with i18n service 8. **AC-8.5-2.8:** Interceptor compatible with exception filters (no conflict) 9. **AC-8.5-2.9:** Automatic response type detection (single, array, paginated) 10. **AC-8.5-2.10:** Build and type checking successful, Swagger UI working

doc.title: Epic 8.5: Technical Refinement & Code Quality
doc.snippet: Enhanced ApiEndpoint decorator with ApiBody integration and global response interceptor for consistent API documentation and standard response format.

doc.title: Epic 8 Technical Specification: API Documentation (Swagger)
doc.snippet: Defines standard response format structure with success, status, data, message fields. Factory functions createApiResponseClass() and createPaginatedApiResponseClass() create runtime wrapper classes.

doc.title: Implementation Patterns (AI Agent Consistency Rules)
doc.snippet: Controllers return DTOs directly, interceptor wraps automatically with standard format. Paginated responses return { data, count } pattern which interceptor transforms.

doc.title: API Contracts
doc.snippet: Success response: { success: true, status, data, count?, message }. Error response: { success: false, status, message, errors? }. HTTP status codes: 200 OK, 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 401 Unauthorized, etc.

artifact.reason: Existing decorator to be enhanced with bodySchema parameter for ApiBody integration. Currently supports params, queries, body.type but needs bodySchema field for multipart/form-data scenarios.
CRUD shortcut decorators that wrap ApiEndpoint. Need to be enhanced to support body schema parameter for file upload scenarios.
Reference interceptor pattern. Shows how to implement NestInterceptor with RxJS operators (tap, catchError). TransformResponseInterceptor will follow similar structure.
Base response class created in Story 8.5-1. Defines structure that interceptor must enforce: success, status, data, message fields.
Base paginated response class. Interceptor must detect { items, count } pattern and transform to { data, count } format.
File upload controller likely uses @ApiBody for multipart/form-data. Needs to be refactored to use ApiEndpoint bodySchema parameter instead.
Controller to refactor for removing manual response wrapping. Service should return raw data, interceptor handles wrapping.
CRUD controller to refactor for removing manual response wrapping.

nestjs.package: ApiOperation, ApiBody, ApiConsumes, SchemaObject, createApiResponseClass, createPaginatedApiResponseClass
I18nService for message translation in interceptor

thirdParty.package: Observable, map operator for response transformation

constraints.constraint: Interceptor must NOT wrap error responses - exception filters handle errors
Controllers must return raw DTOs - no manual { success, status, data } wrapping
Services must return raw data or { items, count } for pagination - interceptor handles wrapping
ApiEndpoint bodySchema parameter must support OpenAPI SchemaObject format for file uploads
Response format must match createApiResponseClass() and createPaginatedApiResponseClass() structure from Epic 8
Import organization must follow 8-group standard: Libraries, DTOs, Services, Repositories, Entities, Interfaces, Enums, Events
Interceptor must run AFTER controller but BEFORE response sent to client
Status code extraction from ExecutionContext for proper response wrapping
Paginated detection pattern: data.items && data.count (service returns this structure)
Build must succeed with npm run build - no TypeScript errors

interface.name: ApiEndpointOptions
NestInterceptor
I18nService
StandardResponse

tests.standards: Unit Testing Framework: Jest (^30.0.0) Test File Pattern: *.spec.ts in __tests__ subdirectories Coverage Target: 95% for critical infrastructure (interceptors) Mocking: Mock I18nService, ExecutionContext, CallHandler for interceptor tests Integration Testing: Supertest for end-to-end endpoint testing Manual Testing: Swagger UI "Try it out" functionality for response validation Build Validation: npm run build must succeed, npm run type-check must pass
tests.locations: src/common/interceptors/__tests__/transform-response.interceptor.spec.ts test/e2e/ (integration tests for response format validation)

test.description: Test ApiEndpoint decorator applies ApiBody with bodySchema
test.approach: Mock @nestjs/swagger decorators, verify ApiBody called with schema object for multipart/form-data

test.description: Test TransformResponseInterceptor wraps single object response
test.approach: Mock CallHandler returning single DTO, verify interceptor returns { success: true, status: 200, data: DTO, message }
Mock CallHandler returning array, verify wrapped as { success: true, data: array, message }
Mock CallHandler returning { items: [], count: N }, verify transformed to { success: true, data: [], count: N, message }

test.description: Test interceptor translates default message via i18n
test.approach: Mock I18nService.t(), verify interceptor calls t('success.OPERATION_SUCCESSFUL')

test.description: Test interceptor does NOT wrap error responses
test.approach: Throw HttpException in CallHandler, verify error propagates unchanged (exception filter handles it)

test.description: Integration test: GET /users (paginated) returns correct format
test.approach: Call endpoint via supertest, verify response structure matches { success, status, data: [], count, message }
Run npm run build, verify exit code 0 with no errors
